hero.headline: AI-Powered Physical Security Intelligence
hero.subtitle: Correlate every access event, door alert, and camera feed in one unified platform — with real-time AI analysis.

features.heading: Everything you need to secure your facility
features.subheading: A unified platform replacing fragmented security systems with one intelligent pane of glass.

featureCards.title: Unified Command Center
featureCards.description: Access control, video surveillance, and AI analysis — all in one real-time dashboard.

featureCards.title: AI-Powered Insights
featureCards.description: Correlate events across systems with AI-generated summaries and anomaly detection.

featureCards.title: Self-Hosted & Private
featureCards.description: Run entirely on your infrastructure. Your video never leaves your network.

featureCards.title: Real-Time Alerts
featureCards.description: Get notified the instant a door is forced, a tailgate is detected, or an anomaly appears.

featureCards.title: Guard-First Mobile
featureCards.description: Field tools designed for guards on patrol — check-in, incident capture, and door control from any device.

featureCards.title: License-Based Pricing
featureCards.description: Simple, predictable licensing. No per-camera fees, no hidden costs.

ai.heading: Built on AI. Powered by you.
ai.subheading: On-premise AI that respects your data privacy — processing happens on your infrastructure, not in the cloud.

testimonials.heading: Trusted by security teams like yours

finalCta.heading: Ready to transform your security operations?
finalCta.body: See how Oversight Hub unifies your video, access control, and AI analysis into one seamless experience.

pricing.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subheading: Start with a free trial. Scale with confidence. No hidden fees.

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: For small teams getting started with intelligent security.

professional.name: Professional
professional.desc: For growing organizations needing advanced features and higher limits.

enterprise.name: Enterprise

pricing.footnote: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

produits.heading: Nuestras soluciones de seguridad física
produits.subheading: Una plataforma unificada para videovigilancia, control de acceso y análisis de IA, diseñada para equipos de seguridad modernos.

video.name: Video Intelligence
video.description: Videovigilancia en tiempo real con análisis de IA, detección de anomalías y correlación de eventos.
features: Análisis de vídeo en tiempo real
Exportación y uso compartido de clips

accessControl.name: Control de acceso
accessControl.description: Gestione credenciales, puertas y zonas de acceso desde un panel centralizado con reglas dinámicas.
features: Control de puertas en tiempo real

aiAnalytics.name: Analítica de IA
aiAnalytics.description: Análisis predictivo, detección de comportamientos sospechosos e informes automatizados impulsados por aprendizaje automático.

analytics.name: Informes y análisis
analytics.description: Visualice tendencias, genere informes de cumplimiento y realice un seguimiento de los indicadores clave de rendimiento de seguridad.

solutions.subheading: Soluciones adaptadas a los desafíos únicos de cada sector empresarial.

challenges: Cientos de puertas y credenciales que gestionar
outcomes: Reducción del 40% en incidentes de seguridad

Tiempo de respuesta un 70% más rápido
